other_observers: Rich Miller (finder), Mark Peterson, Bill Maynard, Brian Gibbons, SeEtta Moss, Rachel Hopper, Tony Leukering, Doug Faulkner, Andrew Spencer, Norm Erthal, Peter Gent, Maggie Boswell, David Waltman, Mymm Ackley, Nathan Pipelow.; Rich Miller found the bird.
description: A small warbler shaped bird, with black upper parts, white wing bar, red belly, long tail, with white. Small thin bill. Dark eyes. See photos.Behaviors: Moving around the trees catching insects.Call: a loud call given often.Plumage: perhaps 2nd year
